issues.title: Simulation stop_time overridden
issues.detail: The original user task specifies stop_time=10 seconds as a mandatory simulation setting that should not be changed. However, run_metadata shows an override to 100.0 seconds, which violates the requirement. Although the simulation completed successfully and results appear physically reasonable, this deviation from the user specification should be addressed.

issues.title: Missing unit attributes on parameters
issues.detail: Parameters such as A_tank, A_orifice, Cd, g, h0, and Q_in have units described in comments but lack explicit unit attributes in their declarations. Adding unit attributes (e.g., unit="m2") would improve model clarity, enable automatic unit checking, and align with Modelica best practices.
issues.evidence: Example: parameter Real A_tank = 0.1 "Cross-sectional area of tank (m^2)";

issues.title: Consider using Modelica Standard Library (MSL) types for better type safety
issues.detail: Parameters like g (acceleration) and areas could be declared using MSL types such as Modelica.Units.SI.Acceleration and Modelica.Units.SI.Area, which are confirmed to exist in the library. This would enhance integration and provide stricter type checking, though using Real with unit attributes is currently legal.

recommendations: Add explicit unit attributes to all parameter declarations (e.g., unit="m2" for areas).
Where applicable, consider replacing Real parameter types with appropriate MSL types (e.g., Modelica.Units.SI.Acceleration for g).
Ensure simulation settings (stop_time, step_size, solver_method, tolerance) strictly adhere to the user task specifications in future runs.

issues.title: 仿真时间参数被覆盖，违反需求
issues.detail: original_user_task 中明确指定仿真总时长 stop_time=10 秒，且强制不可更改。但实际运行时通过 override 设置为 100 秒（见 run_metadata.overrides），这违反了需求，导致仿真结果不匹配指定的时间条件（例如，10 秒内水箱可能未完全排空，而 100 秒结果中 h final=0.0）。
issues.evidence: run_metadata.overrides.stop_time=100.0，而 original_user_task 中指定 stop_time=10 秒。

issues.title: 液位高度微小负值属于正常数值噪声
issues.detail: h 的最小值为 -1e-10 m，V_liquid 的最小值为 -1e-11 m³，绝对量级远小于 1e-6，是 DAE 求解器的正常数值噪声，不构成物理穿透。根据数值容差原则，这可以接受。

recommendations: 重新运行仿真，确保 stop_time 设置为 10 秒以符合原始需求。
